text.title: Writing Implementation Plans Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Writing Implementation Plans.

example.scenario: F-066 plan: 100 methodology rows, est_tokens 80k each, grouped into 5 waves of 20, total 8M tokens within 10M cap. Every row references AD-1 (v3 schema) and AC = 'all six validators green'.
